title: Acana Hanging Moth Killer 2 pack For Wardrobes - Max Performance - Kills in 24 to 48 Hours - Protects Clothing & Bedding
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: HANGING MOTH KILLER. Safely kill moths, eggs and larvae in 24 - 48 hours. Hung conveniently amongst clothing in your wardrobes
AUTOMATIC END OF LIFE INDICATOR. Replace product when membrane is visibily empty. Lasts up to 3 months dependent on airflow & temperature
Protects all clothing and bedding, including woollens, cashmere, linens, furs, leathers & silk.
